//: The deployable helpers (the ./convex entry). NO isolatedDeclarations: they are built on Convex's generic builders, whose RegisteredQuery/RegisteredMutation return types are inferred and cannot be emitted in isolation. Their .d.ts is a convenience for attw only, dispatch is dynamic via anyApi.baas.*, so consumers never import these types. The publishable CLIENT surface (src/, added with the client adapter) keeps isolatedDeclarations + the .d.ts snapshot.
